sections.paragraph:
Σαλαθιήλ, ὁ (שְׁאַלְתִּיאֵל) indecl. (LXX; ViZech 3 [p. 88, 6 Sch].—Jos., Ant. 11, 73 Σαλαθίηλος) Shealtiel, Salathiel, father of Zerubbabel (1 Ch 3:19; 2 Esdr 3:2; 5:2; 22:1; Hg 1:1); in the genealogy of Jesus Mt 1:12 he is a son of Jechoniah (1 Ch 3:17), in Lk 3:27 a son of Neri.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 911
